summary: Comprehensive testing of EventConnect platform completed successfully. All backend APIs (25/25) and frontend features working correctly. Platform ready for production use.
passed_tests: Event browsing and filtering by category - All 6 categories working
Event registration and My Events page - Functional
AI-powered event recommendations - Working with GPT-5.1
AI-powered people recommendations - Working with GPT-5.1
AI icebreaker generation - Working with GPT-5.1
User connections and messaging system - Fully functional
Profile management and editing - Complete functionality
Vibrant design with violet/indigo gradients - Matches requirements
All backend APIs (auth, events, users, connections, messages, AI) - 100% success rate

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor UI polish opportunities)
success_percentage.ai_features: 100% (GPT-5.1 integration working for recommendations and icebreakers)
